description: Slot-swap v4: silent artifact — warning line removed, failure mode structurally hidden
notes: exp-07c was confounded by logger.warning('Heartbeat detected lock loss key=%s') in _beat() — a direct label of the failure mode. exp-07d removes that line and its comment ('Token mismatch: lock expired and was re-acquired by another caller'), leaving only 'if result == 0: return'. The zombie-write failure mode is now structurally hidden again: no code-level hint identifies the lock-expiry scenario. Binary question: does C (P_d Persona + P_p content in Instructions) match I (P_p Persona) or J (P_d baseline)? If C ~ I: few-shot confound is real, content drives detection regardless of slot. If C ~ J: Persona slot is architecturally load-bearing.
